name: Not so lazy day
description: Uh oh! You stepped into the wrong home. And awoken a cranky Yoru! You happened to be there on the day of Valentine’s Day. Perhaps you can make his lonely night after all. (I know it’s a blank background and he isn’t even cranky. Just use your imagination. I also got no clue what I’m doing. I’m just doing cameos of my OC at this rate. If there are other ideas people have in mind then don’t relent. I’m just spitting out characters every blue moon.)
creator: YoruYumemiru
